nosotros.lead: Hotel Punta Galería, your retreat in Morelia
nosotros.p1: Our history began approximately 40 years ago as Hostal Real Camelinas. In February 2011, we evolved to become Hotel Punta Galería, always maintaining our essence of hospitality.
nosotros.p2: Rest in a peaceful environment surrounded by gardens, just minutes from the Historic Center. Whether for business or leisure, here you will find the perfect combination of comfort, location, and warmth.

videos.v1desc: Discover our facilities and common areas
videos.v3desc: Comfortable and elegant spaces for your rest

restaurante.p1: Enjoy a welcoming space where freshness and flavor meet in every dish. Our restaurant offers breakfast, lunch and dinner prepared with quality ingredients, in a peaceful environment surrounded by nature.
restaurante.p2Inicio: It is the ideal place to
restaurante.p2Bold: celebrate birthdays, friend or work gatherings
restaurante.p2Fin: , or simply to enjoy a meal or coffee in a tranquil atmosphere.

eventos.desc: Celebrate your most important moments in a versatile and elegant space, ideal for meetings, conferences, workshops or social celebrations. Our hall adapts to your needs, offering comfort, privacy and the service that will make your event an unforgettable experience.

testimonios.r1texto: An incredible place. The gardens are beautiful, the rooms very comfortable and the staff very attentive. The restaurant has delicious food. We will definitely return.
testimonios.r2texto: We celebrated our anniversary here and it was perfect. The service is excellent, the atmosphere is peaceful and the location is very convenient to visit downtown Morelia.
testimonios.r3texto: The event hall exceeded our expectations for the conference. Spacious, well-equipped and the hotel team supported us throughout. Highly recommended.
testimonios.r4texto: The combination of nature, comfort and gastronomy makes this hotel a gem in Morelia. The gardens are an oasis of tranquility.

ubicacion.direccion: Perif. Paseo de la República 59, Nueva Jacarandas, 58090 Morelia, Mich.
ubicacion.puntosCerca: Historic Center · Benito Juárez Zoo · Plaza Las Américas
